plan_summary.primary_goal: Execute the decennial population and caste census across 28 states and 8 UTs (1.4B people, 240M households, 3M enumerators) between April 2026 and April 2027, achieving 99%+ household coverage, releasing provisional totals within 6 months of Phase 2 and the full caste dataset within 18 months, on a ₹12,000–15,000 crore budget.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests the household-coverage margin against the 99% gate; the budget surplus against the ₹15,000 crore ceiling; the provisional-release-timing margin against the 6-month post-Phase-2 deadline; the ingestion-pipeline MTTR margin against the 4-hour Issue-3 target; and the device-audit-failure margin against the 1% supervisory-penalty trigger. ECI/NSC caste-methodology sign-off, Judicial Review Board statutory authority, and Census Act presidential authorization are treated as unmodelled existential gates.

key_values.label: Household enumeration coverage target
key_values.comment: 99%+ household enumeration coverage is the primary success criterion; below this the entire Pioneer's Gambit fails its viability gate.
key_values.source_text: household coverage success target: 99% of households — viability gate.

key_values.label: Census budget ceiling
key_values.comment: Upper bound of the ₹12,000–15,000 crore Pioneer's Gambit envelope; Risk-7 names 5% overrun as the austerity-trigger that cuts QA processes.
key_values.source_text: budget high estimate: 15,000 crore ₹ — core project cost ceiling.

key_values.label: Provisional-totals release deadline after Phase 2
key_values.comment: Provisional population totals must publish within 6 months post-Phase 2 for delimitation; missing it triggers Risk-2 political-crisis cascade.
key_values.source_text: provisional total publication timeline: 6 months after Phase 2 completion — political constraint.

key_values.label: Cloud-ingestion pipeline MTTR target
key_values.comment: Issue 3 mandates ≤4-hour MTTR for system-wide ingestion-pipeline failure under 3x peak load; above this validation and pay cascades fail.
key_values.source_text: Cloud synchronization pipeline can achieve a maximum restoration time objective of four (4) hours.

key_values.label: Device audit-failure supervisory-penalty trigger
key_values.comment: Decision-7 chain-of-custody penalty trigger: audit failures above 1% impact supervisory performance pay; gates device-fleet integrity.
key_values.source_text: If device audit failures exceed 1%, then this metric triggers supervisory penalties linked to performance metrics.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved household enumeration coverage share at Phase-2 close
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives whether the 99% Pioneer's Gambit gate clears; Risk 1 names 2–5% drop on satellite hub failure, Risk 6 names 5–10% fluid-population undercount.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Combine satellite-hub success rate × paper-audit recovery rate × fluid-population coverage rate; sensitivity to Risk 1, Risk 4 (monsoon), Risk 6 (nomadic/migrant).

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Bottom-up total census spend in INR crore
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether the ₹15,000 crore ceiling holds; Risk 7 names 5% overrun as austerity trigger, Expert Criticism names 15% overrun on satellite-fee runaway.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum 40% tech allocation + satellite hubs + paper audits + emergency device procurement (Risk 5) + 5% contingency + DAMF; sensitivity to Risks 1, 5, 7.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved months from Phase-2 close to provisional-totals publication
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Above 6 months the delimitation deadline fails per Risk-2 (state non-cooperation +2-3 months) and JRB-arbitration-overrun stress test.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Sum Phase-2 aggregation duration + JRB arbitration days + state-cooperation friction; sensitivity to Risk 2 state non-cooperation and JRB arbitration speed.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved cloud-ingestion-pipeline MTTR under simulated 3x peak load
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Above 4 hours Issue-3 stress test predicts 10-day supervisor-review delay and 2-week salary delay, spiking attrition and 2-4 week timeline slip.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Benchmark against national digital-transaction systems' peak load MTTR; sensitivity to burst-capacity headroom and database-replication recovery time.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Achieved device-audit failure share over Phase 1
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Above 1% triggers Decision-7 supervisory penalty cascade; Risk 5 names 10% device loss as the catastrophic scenario forcing ₹400-600 crore emergency procurement.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Combine GPS chain-of-custody compliance rate × theft-damage rate × diverse-supplier-pool failure rate; sensitivity to Risk 5 and high-risk-zone security incidents.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Household coverage margin against the 99% Pioneer's Gambit gate
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin validates the Pioneer's Gambit at the primary success criterion; negative margin invalidates the credibility of the entire census regardless of timeline.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Census budget surplus against the ₹15,000 crore ceiling
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive surplus preserves the 5% contingency and DAMF reserves; negative surplus triggers Risk-7 austerity that cuts the verification-survey QA backstop.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Provisional-totals release timing margin against the 6-month deadline
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin secures the delimitation handoff to ECI on time; negative margin triggers Risk-2 political crisis and 6-month criterion failure.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Cloud-ingestion MTTR margin against the 4-hour Issue-3 target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps validation and 50% performance pay flowing; negative margin breaks the Decision-5 incentive structure and triggers attrition cascade.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Device-audit failure margin against the 1% supervisory-penalty trigger
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive margin keeps device-fleet penalties from cascading into supervisory pay; negative margin compounds Risk-5 emergency procurement with morale collapse.

unmodelled_gates.label: ECI and NSC sign off on the finalized caste linkage logic and acceptance thresholds by Q4 2025
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Issue 1 / Expert Criticism: training 3M enumerators on a moving methodology is catastrophic; without ECI/NSC lockdown by Dec 2025 the entire credibility-and-validation chain collapses regardless of operational success.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Caste-data invalidation by statistical bodies; retraining cost ₹50–100 crore; quality-validation error rates spike from 5% to 15-20%; ROI drops 3-5%.

unmodelled_gates.label: Judicial Review Board legally constituted with statutory authority over data disputes by Q3 2025
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Decision 4 governance hinge: without the JRB the data-release-sequencing arbitration mechanism collapses; provisional-vs-caste sequencing becomes politically litigable mid-Phase-2.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: JRB arbitration delays exceed 6 months; provisional release missed; delimitation political crisis cascades.

unmodelled_gates.label: MoUs from MT/WY/ID state governments dedicating ≥80% of local staff to audit support and dual supervision
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Risk 2 / Question 7: without signed state MoUs the paper-audit-within-72-hours commitment becomes unilateral federal action; states fearing delimitation impact can sabotage by withholding revenue staff.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Paper audits cannot meet 72-hour window; Pioneer's Gambit redundancy thesis collapses; coverage drops to digital-only success rate.

unmodelled_gates.label: President of India authorizes execution under Census Act 1948 prior to Phase 1
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Mandatory legal prerequisite — no field operation can begin without it; not a probabilistic gate but treated as a fixed input by the rest of the model.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: All field operations halt; ₹12,000-15,000 crore allocation cannot be drawn; constitutional/legal crisis.
